text:
is an B5 size, full color artbook published by pixiv Inc. on 12 June 2022. It was part of the collaboration between EVANGELION 
and pixiv. It was organized in joint by pixiv Inc. And Groundworks Co., ltd.. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gB5200102/ 

Overview

The artbook features a collection of artwork done by 56 of the most popular works from the 65,000 EVANGELION fanart pieces posted on pixiv, including 31 winning works from the Evangelion Battle Illustration Contest held on pixiv https://www.eva-info.jp/13177 , which had over 3,800 entries! It also includes 6 original illustrations themed on Evangelion by popular overseas creators. 

Table of Contents

List of artists: -胖宰治-/.tsurumi/０/AiriPan/Andrew.Leung/Archlich/ASK/boyaking/buri/BYSTANDER/Callarin/cell/Chi4/Evenstar/Fishine/魚生/Goomrrat/Grandia元/Hana/Hinaki/Homutan/Hona/HYONEE/ikuyoan/kayanoyuki/KiTA/KRYP0132/MC/Mechamania/mire/Nardack/Neg/NITROBOOST/niz/qosic/Raijuu/redjuice/Rella/Timbougami/Vinne/Yu-h1/Zeronis/あき/あるてら/おゆゆ/かぎお/ケースワベ/スコッティ/たき/たぴおか/チョコサブレ/つゆ/てんぱい/トケタ/ねこのけだま/バーリヤ/はげ/ばん/よし男/温泉みかん/河野/花花子/灸場メロ/魚酥子/慧子/月森つき/玄梦/更紗灯弾/黒田清桐/西尾雄太/西本有里/池本ゆーこ/中西達哉/白糸/白滝/美和野らぐ/物慾/?言/
